title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.260 - Value of fence may be recovered, when
text:
272.260.  Value of fence may be recovered, when. — If the person thus assessed or charged with the value of one-half of any fence, under the provisions of sections 272.210 to 272.370 shall neglect or refuse to pay over to the owner of the fence the amount so awarded, the same may be recovered before a court of competent jurisdiction.
(L. 1963 p. 401 § 6)
